subcodes.first_line: In a Cause of such magnitude, and with the spread and multiplication of the friends in every land, certain events must needs come to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امر باين عظيمی و انتشار و تزايد احباب در هر ديار لابدّ بر آنست که بعضی وقايع حادث شود
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
